steps.name: rough-scene-compatibility-audit
steps.summary: Created experiments/132-physical-rough-terrain-scene/verify/rough-scene-audit.json. Static audit passed for g1-rough-walk, go1-rough-walk, and spot-rough-walk: each canonical registry scene points to the bundled rough MJCF and each rough MJCF has a floor plane plus three named box curb geoms.

steps.name: rough-preset-scene-routing
steps.summary: Added rough terrain scene routing and QA. Rough experiments now default to rough-terrain when no env override exists, rough preset selection routes the selected robot to its rough action in-app, qaEnvironmentSummary records contact-bearing terrain geoms from the active MuJoCo model, and qa/terrain_scene_check.mjs passed for g1/go1/spot rough scenes. Playwright click smoke confirmed g1-walk -> rough preset -> g1-rough-walk with navCount=1 and curb_1..3.
